extraction.one_line_summary: KENNAUGH Peter won from the breakaway on Col de l'Izoard while PORTE Richie dropped FROOME Christopher in final 2km to cement GC dominance
tactical_patterns: Porte dropped Froome 2km from finish on Izoard, revealing Sky hierarchy shift before Tour de France.
Bardet attacked 3km from summit with Weening but failed to distance Swift/Kennaugh, exposing AG2R weakness against punchier climbers.
Talansky launched under-the-radar move before final climb using Clark as launch pad, showing Cannondale tactical preparation.

rider_signals.PORTE Richie: positive: Dropped Froome in final 2km and gained 40 seconds on Bardet group, confirming pre-Tour superiority within Sky
rider_signals.FROOME Christopher: negative: Dropped by teammate Porte 2km from finish, signaling uncertain form three weeks before Tour
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: neutral: Attacked 3km from summit but only gained 40 seconds on Porte despite breakaway buffer, underwhelming for GC threat
rider_signals.CONTADOR Alberto: negative: Suffered on final Izoard ascent, losing time to both Porte and Bardet in critical Tour warmup
rider_signals.KENNAUGH Peter: positive: Beat Swift in two-up sprint after resisting Bardet's late chase, showing climbing/finishing versatility beyond domestique role
